settings.text: Premium cordless table lamps for restaurants, bars, and boutique hotels. Rechargeable. Waterproof. Designed to disappear into the room and transform the atmosphere.

settings.title: No battery costs
settings.description: USB-C rechargeable. No disposable batteries, no ongoing replacement costs. Charge the entire fleet from a standard USB station.

settings.title: No fire risk
settings.description: Replace candles with zero fire risk. No wax, no smoke, no open flame. Straightforward for insurance and health & safety.

settings.title: Indoor and outdoor
settings.description: IP54 rated. Terraces, patios, courtyard dining — rain, condensation, and spilled drinks are all handled.

settings.title: 12 hours per charge
settings.description: Charge during the day, lamp through service. Up to 12 hours means lunch and dinner on a single charge.

settings.text: The more you order, the more you save. No hidden fees.

1–9 lamps · £39–69 (retail pricing)

10–24 lamps · From ~£29–55 per lamp · ~25% off

25–49 lamps · From ~£25–49 per lamp · ~30% off

50+ lamps · Custom quote · Best pricing

Exact pricing depends on design selection and quantities. We'll confirm everything in a detailed proposal within 24 hours.

settings.title: 1. Tell us what you need
settings.description: Fill in the enquiry form with your venue details and estimated quantity. Takes two minutes.

settings.title: 2. Get a proposal within 24 hours
settings.description: We'll send you a detailed quote with pricing, design options, and delivery timeline.

settings.title: 3. Sample or go all in
settings.description: Order a sample at retail price to test on your tables. Or commit to your full order — either way, every lamp is covered by our 30-day guarantee.

settings.text: Tell us about your venue. We'll have a proposal in your inbox within 24 hours.
Want to try one first? Browse our full range and order a sample at retail price. 30-day guarantee on every lamp.

settings.question: Can I order a sample before committing?
settings.answer: Yes. Order any lamp from our shop at retail price. If you proceed with a volume order, we'll credit the sample cost against your total.

settings.question: What are lead times for bulk orders?
settings.answer: Stock orders (10-49 units) typically dispatch within 3-5 business days. Larger orders (50+) within 7-10 business days. We'll confirm the exact timeline in your proposal.

settings.question: Can I mix different designs in one order?
settings.answer: Absolutely. Volume pricing is based on total quantity, not per design. Mix and match freely.

settings.question: Do you offer custom colours or branding?
settings.answer: Not at launch. It's on our roadmap. If you have specific requirements, mention them in your enquiry.

settings.question: Do you offer ongoing supply or replacement agreements?
settings.answer: Yes. We can set up standing orders with locked-in volume pricing for regular replacements or expansion. Just mention it in your enquiry.

settings.question: What warranty do you offer for venues?
settings.answer: 12-month manufacturer warranty on every lamp. For venue customers, we offer priority replacement — a replacement ships the next business day while we arrange collection of the faulty unit.

settings.question: Do you invoice or require payment upfront?
settings.answer: Standard volume orders are paid upfront. For established venue relationships, we can discuss invoice terms. Let us know what works for you.
